narrative:
Union Township has 1,244 registered voters, with 47.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 35.3 percentage points.
